$description: LATTICE Theme #1 — Fine Dining · BOLD preset. Token overrides only — the runtime merges this onto the base tokens in tokens.json. The base theme stays untouched. This preset deepens contrast: a darker hero gold, a darker footer surface, a tighter headline tracking, and slightly more pronounced shadows. Use this when you want the Fine Dining brand to feel weightier — the look-and-feel of a black-tie evening rather than a casual prix-fixe.

$metadata.design_intent: Deeper contrast, stronger gold, weightier serif display. Press / launch / black-tie event variant.

500.$description: Deeper hero gold — for high-contrast headlines, primary CTA on dark surfaces

900.$description: Almost-black gold for text on light surface

surfaceDark.$description: Darker footer / inverse — pushes contrast ratio with white text

text.$description: Near-black body text for maximum reading contrast

textMuted.$description: Slightly stronger muted — keeps the muted/on-surface ratio above 4.5:1 in BOLD

colored.$description: Stronger gold halo around primary buttons

display.$description: Tightened headline tracking — Cormorant Garamond looks more assertive at zero tracking

eyebrow.$description: Wider eyebrow — pushes the editorial gravitas
